# aama.io

> aama.io is fund administration and fund accounting software for mid-market PE/VC fund managers, boutique fund administrators, family offices and SPV deals across Singapore and APAC (positioned as an end-to-end fund operating platform, or "Fund OS"). It covers the fund lifecycle on one platform — fund administration, fund accounting (IFRS 9 / SFRS(I) 9), an LP portal for fund managers, back-office automation, deal flow CRM, data room, SPV management and fund reporting — with MAS and VCC sub-fund support, without enterprise complexity or pricing.

## Platforms (products)

- [Fund Administration](https://aama.io/products/fund-administration): Capital calls, drawdowns, investor onboarding (KYC/AML), allocation tracking, LP communications and a branded investor (LP) portal with real-time NAV, statements and documents.
- [Fund Accounting](https://aama.io/products/fund-accounting): IFRS-based fund accounting, NAV calculation, reconciliation, corporate actions and audit-ready financials.

## Solutions (by audience)

- [Solutions overview](https://aama.io/solutions): How aama.io maps to each type of fund and team.
- [VC / PE Firms](https://aama.io/solutions/vc-pe-firms): Multi-fund administration, waterfalls, carry and LP reporting.
- [SPV Syndicates](https://aama.io/solutions/spv-syndicates): Single-asset vehicle administration and syndicate reporting.
- [Family Offices](https://aama.io/solutions/family-offices): Multi-entity, multi-asset consolidation with MAS-aligned compliance.

## Free tools (no signup)

- [Free fund tools hub](https://aama.io/tools): Calculators and generators for GPs, LPs and fund administrators.
- [Distribution Waterfall Calculator](https://aama.io/tools/waterfall): Four-tier waterfall with preferred return, GP catch-up and clawback.
- [American vs European Waterfall Comparator](https://aama.io/tools/waterfall-comparator): Compare deal-by-deal vs whole-fund carry timing.
- [IRR, TVPI, DPI & RVPI Calculator](https://aama.io/tools/irr-tvpi-dpi-calculator): Fund performance metrics with XIRR and J-curve.
- [Management Fee & Carry Modeler](https://aama.io/tools/fee-carry-modeler): Model gross-to-net fee and carry drag over a fund's life.
- [Capital Call Schedule](https://aama.io/tools/capital-call-schedule): Build and visualise a drawdown schedule.
- [VCC Cost Estimator](https://aama.io/tools/vcc-cost-estimator): Estimate set-up and running costs of a Singapore VCC.
- [MAS Licensing Estimator](https://aama.io/tools/mas-licensing-estimator): Gauge MAS licensing requirements and fees.

## Content

- [Blog](https://aama.io/blog): Guides on distribution waterfalls, fund economics, VCC structuring and Singapore fund operations.
- [How to Set Up a VCC in Singapore (2026)](https://aama.io/blog/how-to-set-up-a-vcc-singapore): Structure (umbrella vs standalone), required service providers, set-up and annual cost, and timeline.
- [Section 13O vs 13U (2026)](https://aama.io/blog/section-13o-vs-13u-singapore): Singapore fund & family-office tax incentives — AUM thresholds, headcount, local-spend tiers and the Singapore-investment requirement compared.
- [Fund Management Licensing in Singapore (2026)](https://aama.io/blog/singapore-fund-management-licence): VCFM vs A/I LFMC vs Retail LFMC — capital, headcount and substance (RFMC closed to new applicants in 2024).
- [How to Start a Fund in Singapore (2026)](https://aama.io/blog/how-to-start-a-fund-singapore): End-to-end roadmap — thesis, VCC structure, MAS licence, 13O/13U incentive, service providers and timeline.
- [IFRS 9 / SFRS(I) 9 for Funds](https://aama.io/blog/ifrs-9-sfrs-i-9-fund-accounting): How funds classify and measure financial instruments — business model + SPPI test, fair-value hierarchy, ECL.
- [FAQ](https://aama.io/faq): Common questions on the platform, NAV, security and compliance.

## About

- [About aama.io](https://aama.io/about): Company, mission and team. Built by UXQode Pte Ltd, Singapore.
- [Pricing](https://aama.io/pricing): Institutional-grade platform with startup-friendly pricing.
- [Contact](https://aama.io/contact): Book a demo or talk to the team.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Preferred name and spelling: "aama.io" (lowercase).
- "SPV" on aama.io means a single-asset fund vehicle (a fund type), not a headline product category.
- Some free tools display illustrative/benchmark figures for guidance; treat tool outputs as estimates, not financial or legal advice.
- Canonical domain: https://aama.io. Full URL list: https://aama.io/sitemap.xml.
